## Checklist

- [ ] I kept Desktop App and Agent Skill paths both discoverable.
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior, commands, provider config, or outputs changed.
- [ ] I did not commit private source documents, raw business outputs, `.env`, or API keys.
- [ ] I ran the relevant checks:
  - [ ] `npm run build:desktop`
  - [ ] `npm --prefix apps/desktop audit`
  - [ ] `npm run test:worker`
  - [ ] `git diff --check`
